name: mira-OSS
description: This is the public release of MIRA OS. Discrete memories decay through momentum loss, tools auto-configure when dropped into tools/ folder, and the system prompt composes from modular trinkets. I would like to think I've made an elegant brain-in-box. You load it and send cURL requests - it talks back, learns, and uses tools. Contributions welcome.
summaryZh: This is the public release of MIRA OS. Discrete memories decay through momentum loss, tools auto-configure when dropped into tools/ folder, and the system prompt composes from modular trinkets. I would like to think I've made an elegant brain-in-box. You load it and send cURL requests - it talks back, learns, and uses tools. Contributions welcome. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
